title: Genotyping protocol for mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"36q2q","text":"This protocol describes the general method to genotype the mice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 100 µL of NaOH into tail sample and place in hot plate at 100C for 00:10:00 . Vortex sample and place in hot plate once more for 00:10:00 .
Add 50 µL of 1M Tris pH 8.0 to neutralize extraction
Obtain a 1.5ml microcentrifuge tube and add 10ul 2x DreamTaq Green Master mix. 2ul forward and reverse primers, 2µL DNA lysate and Nuclease-free water up to 20µL
Thermocycling parameters: 95 o C 5min 95 o C 30sec| x 30 cycles 60 o C 30sec| 72 o C 1min| 72 o C 2min 4 o C hold
In 2% agarose in TAE buffer add 10ul of the sample and run for around 30min
creator: Giulia Tombesi
